Editor's Note: CGTN is launching EconSports Beat, a new series that focuses on the rise of emerging Olympic sports like skateboarding, surfing, and sport climbing. Join us as we explore the exciting world of these popular Olympic events, uncovering innovative business models and highlighting the numerous opportunities they offer to sports enthusiasts.

Breakdancing, the first dance sport in the Olympics, has made its historic Olympic debut at the 2024 Paris Games. Once a niche subculture, street dance has grown into a vibrant industry in China. Our reporter, Sun Shangyi, explores the thriving street dance scene that's emerging in dance studios around the country.
